title: Tall Water Juice Glasses Highball Glass Cocktail Mojito Drinking Tumblers 280ml Set Of 6 Hiball Long Drink Glasses Soda Coke Beverage Everyday Tumblers, Transparent, Home, Restaurant & Parties
features: Simple drinking glasses perfect for many everyday beverages such as water, juice, smoothie, milkshake, coke, lemonade or even cocktails. Crafted from durable glass are these highball tumblers with a wide lower base to give each tumbler dimension and catch light, making your drinks shine as good as there taste!
These drinking glasses/tumblers comes as a Set Of 6. Dimensions of EACH tumbler are – Height: 13cm and Diameter: 6.5cm. The MAXIMUM CAPACITY of each tumbler is 280ml.

HIGHBALL DRINKING GLASSES - Moulded from a single piece of glass are these long highball tumblers, for the smooth & reflective glass surface to catch any form of light and make your drinks visually appealing. Due to it's long dimensions, each tumbler has space to add in a drinking straw, lemon/lime/cucumber slices, mint, berries, ice cubes or crushed ice to always serve desirable drinks with refreshing flavours.

ERGONOMIC FEATURES – These highball tumblers have a transparent glass surface, stable base and a smooth drinking rim to make them easy to use. Transparent surface shall let you serve equal capacity drinks but also, let you be a great host and offer seconds. Solid 1cm glass base shall prevent unwanted spillages from occurring, and a smooth drinking rim shall give a smooth transition for users to get a tasty sip of drinks!

HIGH QUALITY GLASSWARE - For long term durability and resistance these drinking glasses are crafted from strong & sturdy transparent glass. A smooth polished finish ensures they remain in a crisp clear condition after repeated uses and resistant from common damage i.e. chips, scratches and cracks. It is a set which has been thoughtfully been designed to excel many beverage needs.
